config.source:
import torch

def rope_optimized_kernel(q, cos, sin):
    # Reshape for vectorized operations
    q_reshaped = q.view(*q.shape[:-1], -1, 2)
    cos_reshaped = cos.view(*cos.shape[:-1], -1, 1)
    sin_reshaped = sin.view(*sin.shape[:-1], -1, 1)
    
    # Extract even and odd components
    q_even = q_reshaped[..., 0]
    q_odd = q_reshaped[..., 1]
    
    # Apply rotation
    cos_val = cos_reshaped[..., 0]
    sin_val = sin_reshaped[..., 0]
    
    rotated_even = q_even * cos_val - q_odd * sin_val
    rotated_odd = q_even * sin_val + q_odd * cos_val
    
    # Reconstruct output
    out = torch.stack([rotated_even, rotated_odd], dim=-1)
    return out.view_as(q)
